# CreditDoc - Consumer Lending Directory
> CreditDoc is an independent comparison website for credit repair companies, personal lenders, and financial services in the United States.

## About
CreditDoc helps consumers compare credit repair companies, personal loan lenders, and financial services. We provide unbiased reviews, pricing comparisons, BBB ratings, and expert analysis to help Americans make informed financial decisions.

## Key Pages
- [Homepage](https://creditdoc.co/): Compare credit repair companies
- [Best Credit Repair](https://creditdoc.co/best/best-credit-repair-companies/): Top rated companies
- [Fix My Credit](https://creditdoc.co/categories/fix-my-credit/): All credit repair reviews
- [Search](https://creditdoc.co/search/): Search companies by location
- [About Us](https://creditdoc.co/about/): Our methodology and team
- [Disclaimer](https://creditdoc.co/disclaimer/): Important legal disclaimers

## Reviews
We review credit repair companies including The Credit Pros, Credit Saint, Lexington Law, Sky Blue Credit, and The Credit People. Each review includes pricing, features, BBB ratings, pros/cons, and our expert diagnosis.

## Comparisons
Side-by-side comparisons of credit repair services with feature tables, pricing breakdowns, and recommendations.

## Categories
- Fix My Credit (Credit Repair)
- I Need a Loan (Personal Loans)
- Emergency Cash
- Payday Alternatives
- Get Out of Debt (Debt Relief)
- Build My Credit
- Improve My Credit Score (Credit Monitoring)
- Free Help
